name: Surfshark
tagline: Affordable VPN with unlimited device connections
pros: Unlimited simultaneous connections — cover every device you own
CleanWeb ad blocker included in all plans
Nexus technology routes traffic through multiple servers
Based in the Netherlands — strong EU privacy laws
MultiHop (Double VPN) and rotating IP features
cons: Speeds slightly slower than NordVPN in some regions
Smaller server network than NordVPN (3,200 vs 6,400)
Kill switch can be unreliable on some platforms
Customer support response times can be slow
Monthly plan is expensive ($15.45/mo) — only worth it on long-term plans
